# Logos

Use exported Protopipe logo assets from `doc/09_identity/assets/logo/out/` when
the deck needs brand marks.

`protopipe-logo-color-full.svg` is copied from the canonical exported logo:

`doc/09_identity/assets/logo/out/svg/logo-color-full.svg`

The copy exists so Quarto and GitHub Pages can package the presentation as a
self-contained derived artifact. Canonical logo source remains in `doc/`.
